message.content:
@startuml
title 资料图片编辑

participant "授课端" as Client #LightBlue200
database "cos/oss" as COS #LightGreen150
box "" imgsvc livesvc #WhiteSmoke
    participant "imgsvc\n(PT V3 wiki:185074611)" as ImgSvc #LavenderBlush190
end box
package liveteachingsvc {
    component "/{h5}pt/v1/study_material/course_images_cover" as CoverApi #PaleGoldenRod200
}


Client ->> ImgSvc : /pb/v1/media/add/image \n(wiki:11574780) 
activate ImgSvc
ImgSvc --> Client : return media_id_list deactivate ImgSvc 

group PT覆盖已绑定课程学习资料图片 (wiki:288327306)\nin参：需要解绑的general_file_id列表、\n      需要替换的image列表（包含被替换的general_file_id）
   note right of Client  
       delete t_general_file （原general_file ）\ninsert t_general_file （替换的general_file ）   
        endnote
    
     activate CoverApi    
     
         alt general_file存在且未删除过
            
            loop for each item in need_unbind_ids
                
                coverapi->coverapi:delete_t_live_order_course_general_file(item.id )
                
             endloop
        
          else 
            
              opt if not exist then insert record first
                    
                    coverapi->coverapi:create_new_record_for_this_item()
                    
               endif
                        
           endif
